changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_name_trgm ON users USING gin (name gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email_trgm ON users USING gin (email gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_course_id_trgm ON users USING gin (course_id gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_courses_name_trgm ON courses USING gin (name gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_teams_name_trgm ON teams USING gin (name gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sections_name_trgm ON sections USING gin (name gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_instructors_display_name_trgm ON instructors USING gin (display_name gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_instructors_role_trgm ON instructors USING gin (role gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_accounts_google_id_trgm ON accounts USING gin (google_id gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_name_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (name gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_email_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (email gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_institute_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (institute gin_trgm_ops);

changeSet.author: search-migration
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_account_requests_comments_trgm ON account_requests USING gin (comments gin_trgm_ops);
